prompt:
Scene:
A quiet black studio table with a matte charcoal surface, soft gray background, and a controlled product photography setup. One large softbox reflection appears as a clean rectangular highlight.

Subject:
A single rose made entirely of transparent hand-blown glass, centered in the frame, lying diagonally from lower left stem to upper right bloom. The rose has five layered petals, a slender curved stem, and two small glass leaves. It fills about 70% of the square frame.

Important details:
Photorealistic macro product photo, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, accurate glass caustics, crisp transparent edges, tiny trapped air bubbles, subtle refraction through overlapping petals, black table reflection, restrained palette of clear glass, charcoal, and cool white highlights.

Use case:
First image in a three-image material consistency series for a public gallery. Square crop-safe card with the glass rose readable at thumbnail size.

Constraints:
No text, no watermark, no logo, no human hands, no extra flowers, no colored petals, no cartoon style, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Studio Rose
description: Studio Rose keeps the same transparent glass rose in a material consistency series.

generation.runner_notes: No reference image required. Queue can run this image directly from prompt.

en.title: Studio Rose
en.description: Studio Rose keeps the same transparent glass rose in a material consistency series.
